results.title: Reset? What reset?
results.description: GOOD MORNING — and a happy Ascension Day to those in countries where it’s a public holiday. I’m Gabriel Gavin. In today’s Playbook: — The U.K. wants a big reset. Fine, says the EU — but it will cost you. — Parliament’s plenary debates are ... well, boring. There’s a plan to fix that. — Faces in the crowd: Sandro Gozi, Maroš Šefčovič, [...]
